title: One Piece GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off One Piece.
body:

[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/one-piece-gui-pack)

[![website](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/website_vector.svg)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga One Piece. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the favourite characters and of course the mc Monkey D. Luffy.

## Recommended Modpack
- [**Wan Pisu (One Piece)**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wanpisu)

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
